description_long: This is a cylindrical metal trash bin with a removable, flat lid featuring a central handle for easy lifting. The exterior surface is weathered, showing patches of rust, discoloration, and greenish moss or grime, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. Vertical ridges reinforce the body, providing structural strength and a classic urban design. Two side-mounted, external metal handles are present for manual lifting and transport. The bin appears robust and utilitarian, suitable for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or near garages. There are no visible labels, signage, or recycling symbols on its surface.
description: A weathered, cylindrical metal trash bin with a flat removable lid, side handles, and a rusted, mossy exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid with a central handle and one of the side-mounted handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the external handle and the flatness of the lid, with more visible weathering and grime.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite side handle and the same lid design.
description_view_3: Side view with the other external handle visible, emphasizing the cylindrical shape and surface texture.
attribute_handle_design: external side-mounted handles and a top-mounted lid handle
